name: FIRST KEYSTONE CORP
summary: General First Keystone Corporation (the Corporation) is a Pennsylvania business corporation, and a bank holding company, registered with and supervised by the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System (the Federal Reserve Board). The Corporation was incorporated on July6, 1983, and commenced operations on July2, 1984, upon consummation of the acquisition of all of the outstanding stock of First National Bank of Berwick (the predecessor to First Keystone Community Bank).
